meta.title: DEF CON 29 Adversary Village - Phillip Wylie - The Way of The Adversary
meta.description: The adversary philosophy and mindset are important when trying to emulate a threat actor during a red team operation or offensive cybersecurity assessment or trying to understand them as a defender. In this talk we will take a look at the philosophy and mindset of an adversary as well as what motivates them.
